perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two men are arguing and shoving each other on a wooden deck next to a pond. One man accidentally knocks a keychain from the other's hand into the water. (2) A woman dressed in white with a tinsel crown (the Goddess) emerges from the pond with bubbles surrounding her. (3) The Goddess holds a treasure chest and presents various colorful monster-like keychains to the first man. He points and describes his lost item. (4) The Goddess smiles and presents a large retail box of keychains. The man is overjoyed and starts unboxing them, showing gold-colored monster keychains to the camera. (5) The second man, seeing the reward, intentionally tosses his own item into the pond. The Goddess reappears, but this time she looks apologetic, and the man is left empty-handed and distraught. (6) The video ends with a shot of four different monster keychains lined up on a wooden rail.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Loud, aggressive shouting between two male voices, followed by a clear splashing sound. (2) A transition to a magical, bubbling sound effect with a shimmering chime as the female voice enters. (3) The female voice speaks in a calm, gentle, and rhythmic tone. The first male voice responds with high-pitched excitement. (4) Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic background music begins as they discuss the product. (5) Another splash sound is heard, followed by a repeat of the bubbling sound effect. (6) The female voice speaks again, sounding slightly more informational, followed by a final comedic 'boing' or sad sound effect as the second male realizes he won't get anything.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '鑰匙圈飛出' (Keychain flies out) and '(掉進河裡了...)' (Fell into the river...) explaining the action. (2) Hook Text: '你推屁推啊!!' '那很貴欸!!' capturing the argument's intensity. (3) Functional Text: '(河中女神出場音效)' (Goddess of the river entrance sound effect). (4) Decorative Text: '忍者龜牙寶' (Ninja Turtle Tooth Baby?) and '放克牙寶鑰匙圈 S3金派系列' (Fuggler Keychain S3 Gold Party Series) used for product branding. (5) Functional Text: '12月26號可以到全家去購買' (Can be purchased at FamilyMart on December 26) acting as a Call to Action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a classic fable structure: Conflict -> Magical Intervention -> Reward for Honesty -> Attempted Greed -> Punishment/Lesson.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two men on the bridge, one woman acting as the goddess.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One man in a white and black patterned cardigan, one man in a dark plaid jacket with bleached hair, and one woman in a white dress with a tinsel headpiece.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A scenic park with a wooden walkway, a calm pond, green trees, and residential buildings in the distance.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Conflict -> Resolution -> Secondary Conflict -> Lesson
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the 'Fuggler S3 Gold Party Series' monster keychains. The video uses a humorous skit based on the 'Honest Woodsman' fable to highlight the different collectible items and their availability at FamilyMart stores.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the retail box, unboxing of the product, and text directing viewers to a specific retailer (FamilyMart).

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Variety-show style captions and exaggerated comedic acting typical of Taiwanese social media creators.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively blends product placement with a well-known narrative trope, making the advertisement engaging and shareable.
